updateDialog.title: Update AstrBot

preReleaseWarning.title: Pre-release Version Notice
preReleaseWarning.description: Versions marked as pre-release may contain unknown issues or bugs and are not recommended for production use. If you encounter any problems, please visit

updateDialog.tipContinue: By default, the corresponding version of the WebUI files will be downloaded when switching versions. The WebUI code is located in the dashboard directory of the project, and you can use npm to build it yourself.
updateDialog.dockerTip: When switching versions, it will try to update both the bot main program and the dashboard. If you are using Docker deployment, you can also re-pull the image or use

redirectConfirm.title: Leaving AstrBot
redirectConfirm.message: You are about to open the GitHub Releases page. Continue?
redirectConfirm.guideStep1: Download the installer that matches your OS and architecture.
redirectConfirm.guideStep3: If you use Docker, prefer the image update path.

desktopApp.title: Update Desktop App
desktopApp.message: Check and upgrade the AstrBot desktop application.
desktopApp.hasNewVersion: A new version is available. Click confirm to upgrade.
desktopApp.installing: Downloading and installing update. The app will restart automatically...
desktopApp.checkFailed: Failed to check updates. Please try again later.
desktopApp.installFailed: Upgrade failed. Please try again later.

dashboardUpdate.title: Update Dashboard to Latest Version Only
dashboardUpdate.fallback: Use this to re-download the WebUI if the full update path fails.

accountDialog.title: Modify Account
accountDialog.securityWarning: Security Reminder: Please change your password to secure your account
accountDialog.securityWarningLegacy: The new AstrBot version has improved security. Please change your password.
accountDialog.securityWarningUpgrade: Legacy password storage detected. Please change your password to complete the security upgrade.

form.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase letters, and digits
form.confirmPasswordHint: Please enter new password again to confirm
form.usernameHint: Leave blank to keep current username
form.defaultCredentials: The default username is astrbot. An initial password is generated on first startup and shown in the console.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter
validation.passwordDigit: Password must include at least one digit
validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
